title: Device Home Screen - Quick Settings modal
scenario: Verify that tapping any Quick Setting on the Device Home Screen opens a modal with all related options for changing settings.
steps: 1. Navigate to the Device Home Screen.
2. Locate and tap any Quick Setting tile.
3. Observe that a modal opens displaying all related options for that setting.
4. Verify that the user can change the setting from the modal.
5. Repeat steps 2-4 for every available Quick Setting on the Home Screen.
6. Go to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection and configure additional Quick Settings if available.
7. Return to the Device Home Screen and tap each newly added Quick Setting.
8. Confirm that each opens a modal with all related options and allows changing the setting.
expected: Tapping any Quick Setting on the Device Home Screen opens a modal with all related options, allowing the user to change settings. This works for every available setting, including those configured via Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
